changes.old: Napoleone demanded permission to return to his country
changes.new: Napoleone asked permission to return to his country
changes.reason: Restores Gemini's 'asked'; domanda = asks/requests, not demands, keeping the deferential register of a returning exile.
changes.context_sentence: ven from the throne, and Napoleone asked permission to return to his country. To overcome the parliam

changes.old: stood in his path to the heights of power
changes.new: barred his path to sublime heights
changes.reason: Restores Gemini's 'barred his path to sublime heights'; sbarrava = barred/blocked and sublime is in the source, not the gloss 'power'.
changes.context_sentence: n four years before him, barred his path to sublime heights.  Our revolutionary move
